original_image_tags: Scanned document page, appears to be the reverse side or a continuation sheet. The paper shows significant bleed-through from text on the opposite side, which is reversed and largely illegible. There are two punch holes at the top edge. The bottom of the page contains a blue ink stamp.

elements.description: Faint reversed text from the front of the page is visible through the paper. At the bottom, a clearly legible blue stamp contains the text 'wp JONES', 'RECEIVED FBI DEPT OF JUSTICE', and 'FEB 14 8 41 AM '57'. There are also two hole punches at the top edge.

judge.reason: Description B provides specific, quoted text ('wp JONES', 'RECEIVED FBI DEPT OF JUSTICE', etc.) for a stamp that Description A describes only as a 'blue ink stamp' without any legible text, creating a direct contradiction on the content of the visual element.
